definitions.text: A settlement; an area with residential districts, shops and amenities, and its own local government; especially one larger than a village and smaller than a city, historically enclosed by a fence or walls, with total populations ranging from several hundred to more than a hundred thousand (as of the early 21st century)
examples: This town is really dangerous because these youngsters have Beretta handguns.

definitions.text: Any more urbanized centre than the place of reference.
examples: I'll be in Yonkers, then I'm driving into town to see the Knicks at the Garden tonight.
